name: Salmon Steaks with Cucumber Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the salmon steaks in a microwave-safe dish with the thick end facing outward.
2. Add the remaining ingredients on top of the steaks.
3. Cover and nuke on high for 4-6 minutes.
4. Serve with cucumber-dill sauce.
5. For the cucumber-dill sauce: Combine all ingredients in a food processor. Process until blended. Pour into a serving bowl and refrigerate 1-2 hours before serving.
